raw: {"perspective": "Product Strategist", "findings": [{"severity": "critical", "file_or_area": "packages/swarm/archive/code_index.py", "issue": "Index builder is in archive/ and not executed; SKIP_DIRS includes 'archive', preventing file discovery. Index is stale with 0 modules/endpoints despite recent built_at.", "recommended_fix": "Move code_index.py out of archive/, add CI/CD job to run it on every push, and create code-index.config.js to define module/endpoint rules."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "Index corruption risks systemic drift — agents operate on false context", "next_files_to_read": ["packages/swarm/archive/code_index.py", "memory/swarm/code-index.json"]}

findings.issue: Index builder is in archive/ and not executed; SKIP_DIRS includes 'archive', preventing file discovery. Index is stale with 0 modules/endpoints despite recent built_at.
findings.recommended_fix: Move code_index.py out of archive/, add CI/CD job to run it on every push, and create code-index.config.js to define module/endpoint rules.

whistleblower_flag: Index corruption risks systemic drift — agents operate on false context
